sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105649" key="truge/ranos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρυγέρᾰνος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, burlesque name of an animal, to be sent to Seleucus in exchange for his tiger, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0487.tlg001:47" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">47</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
